records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your hard work. The rescue target is confirmed to be safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your hard work. The rescue target is confirmed to be safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your hard work. The rescue target is confirmed to be safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd like to request payment, I can assist with the paperwork.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd like to request payment, I can assist with the paperwork.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd like to request payment, I can assist with the paperwork.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...This wasn't about money. I acted as a knight should.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...This wasn't about money. I acted as a knight should.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...This wasn't about money. I acted as a knight should.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, what about the request I made?
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, what about the request I made?
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, what about the request I made?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I relayed the message about treating the knight bachelors in the refugee district.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I relayed the message about treating the knight bachelors in the refugee district.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I relayed the message about treating the knight bachelors in the refugee district.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But tensions are high. There's no real way forward for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But tensions are high. There's no real way forward for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But tensions are high. There's no real way forward for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How many times do we have to say it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How many times do we have to say it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How many times do we have to say it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If someone dies because you let those knight-C.O.s in here, will you take responsibility?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If someone dies because you let those knight-C.O.s in here, will you take responsibility?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If someone dies because you let those knight-C.O.s in here, will you take responsibility?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knight-C.O.s?! We're not C.O.s! That's no way to talk to people who just saved you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knight-C.O.s?! We're not C.O.s! That's no way to talk to people who just saved you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knight-C.O.s?! We're not C.O.s! That's no way to talk to people who just saved you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Dame Liv. We're used to this by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Dame Liv. We're used to this by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Dame Liv. We're used to this by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Used to this?! You call throwing rocks at your saviors normal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Used to this?! You call throwing rocks at your saviors normal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Used to this?! You call throwing rocks at your saviors normal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those guys fought C.O.s and got hurt doing it. This is just cruel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those guys fought C.O.s and got hurt doing it. This is just cruel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those guys fought C.O.s and got hurt doing it. This is just cruel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, Dame Liv. My helmet's tough. There's barely even a scratch on it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, Dame Liv. My helmet's tough. There's barely even a scratch on it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, Dame Liv. My helmet's tough. There's barely even a scratch on it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. What kind of knights would we be if we couldn't take a few rocks?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. What kind of knights would we be if we couldn't take a few rocks?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. What kind of knights would we be if we couldn't take a few rocks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't joke about it! What if the wounds get worse later?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't joke about it! What if the wounds get worse later?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't joke about it! What if the wounds get worse later?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Liv, that's enough. You're scaring the refugees.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Liv, that's enough. You're scaring the refugees.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Liv, that's enough. You're scaring the refugees.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Martin's wounds aren't deep. He'll be fine once we return to HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Martin's wounds aren't deep. He'll be fine once we return to HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Martin's wounds aren't deep. He'll be fine once we return to HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Deputy...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Deputy...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Deputy...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...My apologies. I lost my temper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...My apologies. I lost my temper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...My apologies. I lost my temper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Standing up for your comrades is noble. You just let your emotions get the better of you this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Standing up for your comrades is noble. You just let your emotions get the better of you this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Standing up for your comrades is noble. You just let your emotions get the better of you this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, the rescue mission is complete. Let's head back for today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, the rescue mission is complete. Let's head back for today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, the rescue mission is complete. Let's head back for today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knights, return to base.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights, return to base.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights, return to base.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I often have nightmares if I don't exhaust myself to sleep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I often have nightmares if I don't exhaust myself to sleep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I often have nightmares if I don't exhaust myself to sleep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dreams of holding a broken sword while my comrades face some massive threat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dreams of holding a broken sword while my comrades face some massive threat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dreams of holding a broken sword while my comrades face some massive threat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why won't you say anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why won't you say anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why won't you say anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I could tell when we crossed blades. They weren't just copies!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I could tell when we crossed blades. They weren't just copies!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I could tell when we crossed blades. They weren't just copies!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was the vow to justice and the stars... a lie from the start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was the vow to justice and the stars... a lie from the start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was the vow to justice and the stars... a lie from the start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not all justice stems from righteousness, Dame Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not all justice stems from righteousness, Dame Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not all justice stems from righteousness, Dame Esterosa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even Red Shift's pursuit of personal profit came from the Star Guide, did it not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even Red Shift's pursuit of personal profit came from the Star Guide, did it not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even Red Shift's pursuit of personal profit came from the Star Guide, did it not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why did the Elder Council stop us from entering the Qliphoth Game?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why did the Elder Council stop us from entering the Qliphoth Game?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why did the Elder Council stop us from entering the Qliphoth Game?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So many lives were at stake. We had no reason not to fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So many lives were at stake. We had no reason not to fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So many lives were at stake. We had no reason not to fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're seeing the reason now with your own eyes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're seeing the reason now with your own eyes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're seeing the reason now with your own eyes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was no need to abandon the Administration's task just to rush to the front.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was no need to abandon the Administration's task just to rush to the front.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was no need to abandon the Administration's task just to rush to the front.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in the end, all we've earned is the disgrace of being called Knight-C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in the end, all we've earned is the disgrace of being called Knight-C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in the end, all we've earned is the disgrace of being called Knight-C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Help people in distress. That's the very first rule of the Zodiac Knights!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Help people in distress. That's the very first rule of the Zodiac Knights!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Help people in distress. That's the very first rule of the Zodiac Knights!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can such emotional, reckless behavior be justified?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can such emotional, reckless behavior be justified?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can such emotional, reckless behavior be justified?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And helping people in distress, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And helping people in distress, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And helping people in distress, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me laugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me laugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every time I wake up with a start, soaked in a cold sweat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every time I wake up with a start, soaked in a cold sweat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every time I wake up with a start, soaked in a cold sweat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but wonder if my nightmares will ever come true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but wonder if my nightmares will ever come true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but wonder if my nightmares will ever come true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just a monster, stained by the blood of others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just a monster, stained by the blood of others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just a monster, stained by the blood of others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>In the end, you couldn't protect a single thing.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>In the end, you couldn't protect a single thing.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>In the end, you couldn't protect a single thing.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I passed out again, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I passed out again, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I passed out again, didn't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've been overtraining yourself lately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've been overtraining yourself lately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've been overtraining yourself lately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand how you feel, but you'll destroy your health at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand how you feel, but you'll destroy your health at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand how you feel, but you'll destroy your health at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, the fact that I collapsed just proves how weak I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, the fact that I collapsed just proves how weak I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, the fact that I collapsed just proves how weak I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That only means... I need to push harder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That only means... I need to push harder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That only means... I need to push harder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, what brings you here, Deputy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, what brings you here, Deputy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, what brings you here, Deputy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Weren't you scheduled to teach the Academy cadets today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Weren't you scheduled to teach the Academy cadets today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Weren't you scheduled to teach the Academy cadets today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That lesson was canceled. I came because I have something to tell you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That lesson was canceled. I came because I have something to tell you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That lesson was canceled. I came because I have something to tell you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need to head to HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need to head to HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need to head to HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Elders have summoned the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Elders have summoned the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Elders have summoned the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! It's been a while since things were this lively.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! It's been a while since things were this lively.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! It's been a while since things were this lively.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously. Even the old men who never show their faces are here. What's going on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously. Even the old men who never show their faces are here. What's going on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously. Even the old men who never show their faces are here. What's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the first time the Elder Council has summoned us since the former captain's inauguration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the first time the Elder Council has summoned us since the former captain's inauguration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the first time the Elder Council has summoned us since the former captain's inauguration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know the exact reason, but it's clear all knights are expected to attend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know the exact reason, but it's clear all knights are expected to attend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know the exact reason, but it's clear all knights are expected to attend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, what do you think the Elders want to say to us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, what do you think the Elders want to say to us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, what do you think the Elders want to say to us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe they're handing out bonuses for all the hard work we've done lately?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe they're handing out bonuses for all the hard work we've done lately?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe they're handing out bonuses for all the hard work we've done lately?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. Anyone who obsesses over money isn't worthy of the title of knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. Anyone who obsesses over money isn't worthy of the title of knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. Anyone who obsesses over money isn't worthy of the title of knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, no need to be so uptight. You'll age faster like that, Deputy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, no need to be so uptight. You'll age faster like that, Deputy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, no need to be so uptight. You'll age faster like that, Deputy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! One of the Elders just went "ahem!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! One of the Elders just went "ahem!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! One of the Elders just went "ahem!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are they about to start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are they about to start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are they about to start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honored knights, thank you for gathering despite the recent unrest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honored knights, thank you for gathering despite the recent unrest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honored knights, thank you for gathering despite the recent unrest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though Red Shift has kept the twelve houses from fully assembling,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though Red Shift has kept the twelve houses from fully assembling,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though Red Shift has kept the twelve houses from fully assembling,

records.m_Talk_ENG: we thank you for responding to the Council's call without hesitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: we thank you for responding to the Council's call without hesitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: we thank you for responding to the Council's call without hesitation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the name of Mahel Frayder, servant of the stars, may the Star Guide light your path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the name of Mahel Frayder, servant of the stars, may the Star Guide light your path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the name of Mahel Frayder, servant of the stars, may the Star Guide light your path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Hansol. Doesn't this feel like one of the Academy Chairwoman's old speeches?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Hansol. Doesn't this feel like one of the Academy Chairwoman's old speeches?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Hansol. Doesn't this feel like one of the Academy Chairwoman's old speeches?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My eyes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My eyes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My eyes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: are closing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: are closing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: are closing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's disrespectful, Dame Liv. You should pay attention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's disrespectful, Dame Liv. You should pay attention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's disrespectful, Dame Liv. You should pay attention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Sir Hansol! These chairs are suuuper soft!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Sir Hansol! These chairs are suuuper soft!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Sir Hansol! These chairs are suuuper soft!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boing! Boing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boing! Boing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boing! Boing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Captain! Deputy! Help me, please!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Captain! Deputy! Help me, please!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Captain! Deputy! Help me, please!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You two? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You two? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You two? What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Elders... That thing they're holding. Could it be...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Elders... That thing they're holding. Could it be...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Elders... That thing they're holding. Could it be...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then. We've gathered you to deliver the Council's stance on recent disgraceful acts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then. We've gathered you to deliver the Council's stance on recent disgraceful acts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then. We've gathered you to deliver the Council's stance on recent disgraceful acts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You all know of Blue Shift's unauthorized participation in the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You all know of Blue Shift's unauthorized participation in the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You all know of Blue Shift's unauthorized participation in the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An order is justice in structure. If one breaks tradition for personal intent, we are bound to hold them accountable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An order is justice in structure. If one breaks tradition for personal intent, we are bound to hold them accountable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An order is justice in structure. If one breaks tradition for personal intent, we are bound to hold them accountable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the former captain swore the same oath, we didn't know if it came from conviction or pride...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the former captain swore the same oath, we didn't know if it came from conviction or pride...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the former captain swore the same oath, we didn't know if it came from conviction or pride...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, their reckless defiance, straying from the orbit of the stars, has shattered the steadfast trust of our knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, their reckless defiance, straying from the orbit of the stars, has shattered the steadfast trust of our knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, their reckless defiance, straying from the orbit of the stars, has shattered the steadfast trust of our knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To the one who strayed from the light of the constellations and broke her vow, we name you now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To the one who strayed from the light of the constellations and broke her vow, we name you now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To the one who strayed from the light of the constellations and broke her vow, we name you now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Esterosa de Chevalier.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Esterosa de Chevalier.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Esterosa de Chevalier.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will now begin deliberation on the <color=#ffd34c>dismissal of her position as Knight Captain</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will now begin deliberation on the <color=#ffd34c>dismissal of her position as Knight Captain</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will now begin deliberation on the <color=#ffd34c>dismissal of her position as Knight Captain</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your hard work. The rescue target is confirmed to be safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your hard work. The rescue target is confirmed to be safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your hard work. The rescue target is confirmed to be safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd like to request payment, I can assist with the paperwork.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd like to request payment, I can assist with the paperwork.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd like to request payment, I can assist with the paperwork.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...This wasn't about money. I acted as a knight should.

root.m_Talk_DEU: How many times do we have to say it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How many times do we have to say it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...My apologies. I lost my temper.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...My apologies. I lost my temper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Standing up for your comrades is noble. You just let your emotions get the better of you this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Standing up for your comrades is noble. You just let your emotions get the better of you this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Standing up for your comrades is noble. You just let your emotions get the better of you this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, the rescue mission is complete. Let's head back for today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, the rescue mission is complete. Let's head back for today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, the rescue mission is complete. Let's head back for today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knights, return to base.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knights, return to base.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knights, return to base.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I often have nightmares if I don't exhaust myself to sleep.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I often have nightmares if I don't exhaust myself to sleep.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I often have nightmares if I don't exhaust myself to sleep.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dreams of holding a broken sword while my comrades face some massive threat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dreams of holding a broken sword while my comrades face some massive threat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dreams of holding a broken sword while my comrades face some massive threat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why won't you say anything?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why won't you say anything?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why won't you say anything?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I could tell when we crossed blades. They weren't just copies!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I could tell when we crossed blades. They weren't just copies!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I could tell when we crossed blades. They weren't just copies!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was the vow to justice and the stars... a lie from the start?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was the vow to justice and the stars... a lie from the start?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was the vow to justice and the stars... a lie from the start?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not all justice stems from righteousness, Dame Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not all justice stems from righteousness, Dame Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not all justice stems from righteousness, Dame Esterosa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even Red Shift's pursuit of personal profit came from the Star Guide, did it not?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even Red Shift's pursuit of personal profit came from the Star Guide, did it not?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even Red Shift's pursuit of personal profit came from the Star Guide, did it not?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why did the Elder Council stop us from entering the Qliphoth Game?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then why did the Elder Council stop us from entering the Qliphoth Game?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then why did the Elder Council stop us from entering the Qliphoth Game?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So many lives were at stake. We had no reason not to fight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So many lives were at stake. We had no reason not to fight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So many lives were at stake. We had no reason not to fight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you're seeing the reason now with your own eyes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you're seeing the reason now with your own eyes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you're seeing the reason now with your own eyes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There was no need to abandon the Administration's task just to rush to the front.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There was no need to abandon the Administration's task just to rush to the front.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was no need to abandon the Administration's task just to rush to the front.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in the end, all we've earned is the disgrace of being called Knight-C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in the end, all we've earned is the disgrace of being called Knight-C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in the end, all we've earned is the disgrace of being called Knight-C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Help people in distress. That's the very first rule of the Zodiac Knights!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Help people in distress. That's the very first rule of the Zodiac Knights!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Help people in distress. That's the very first rule of the Zodiac Knights!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How can such emotional, reckless behavior be justified?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How can such emotional, reckless behavior be justified?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How can such emotional, reckless behavior be justified?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And helping people in distress, you say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And helping people in distress, you say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And helping people in distress, you say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me laugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me laugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every time I wake up with a start, soaked in a cold sweat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every time I wake up with a start, soaked in a cold sweat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every time I wake up with a start, soaked in a cold sweat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but wonder if my nightmares will ever come true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but wonder if my nightmares will ever come true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but wonder if my nightmares will ever come true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just a monster, stained by the blood of others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just a monster, stained by the blood of others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just a monster, stained by the blood of others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>In the end, you couldn't protect a single thing.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>In the end, you couldn't protect a single thing.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>In the end, you couldn't protect a single thing.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I passed out again, didn't I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I passed out again, didn't I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I passed out again, didn't I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've been overtraining yourself lately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've been overtraining yourself lately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've been overtraining yourself lately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand how you feel, but you'll destroy your health at this rate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand how you feel, but you'll destroy your health at this rate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand how you feel, but you'll destroy your health at this rate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, the fact that I collapsed just proves how weak I am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, the fact that I collapsed just proves how weak I am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, the fact that I collapsed just proves how weak I am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That only means... I need to push harder.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That only means... I need to push harder.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That only means... I need to push harder.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, what brings you here, Deputy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, what brings you here, Deputy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, what brings you here, Deputy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Weren't you scheduled to teach the Academy cadets today?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Weren't you scheduled to teach the Academy cadets today?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Weren't you scheduled to teach the Academy cadets today?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That lesson was canceled. I came because I have something to tell you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That lesson was canceled. I came because I have something to tell you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That lesson was canceled. I came because I have something to tell you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need to head to HQ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need to head to HQ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need to head to HQ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Elders have summoned the Order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Elders have summoned the Order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Elders have summoned the Order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! It's been a while since things were this lively.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! It's been a while since things were this lively.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! It's been a while since things were this lively.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously. Even the old men who never show their faces are here. What's going on?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously. Even the old men who never show their faces are here. What's going on?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously. Even the old men who never show their faces are here. What's going on?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the first time the Elder Council has summoned us since the former captain's inauguration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the first time the Elder Council has summoned us since the former captain's inauguration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the first time the Elder Council has summoned us since the former captain's inauguration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know the exact reason, but it's clear all knights are expected to attend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know the exact reason, but it's clear all knights are expected to attend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know the exact reason, but it's clear all knights are expected to attend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, what do you think the Elders want to say to us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, what do you think the Elders want to say to us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, what do you think the Elders want to say to us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe they're handing out bonuses for all the hard work we've done lately?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe they're handing out bonuses for all the hard work we've done lately?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe they're handing out bonuses for all the hard work we've done lately?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. Anyone who obsesses over money isn't worthy of the title of knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. Anyone who obsesses over money isn't worthy of the title of knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. Anyone who obsesses over money isn't worthy of the title of knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, no need to be so uptight. You'll age faster like that, Deputy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, no need to be so uptight. You'll age faster like that, Deputy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, no need to be so uptight. You'll age faster like that, Deputy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! One of the Elders just went "ahem!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! One of the Elders just went "ahem!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! One of the Elders just went "ahem!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are they about to start?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are they about to start?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are they about to start?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honored knights, thank you for gathering despite the recent unrest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honored knights, thank you for gathering despite the recent unrest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honored knights, thank you for gathering despite the recent unrest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though Red Shift has kept the twelve houses from fully assembling,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though Red Shift has kept the twelve houses from fully assembling,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though Red Shift has kept the twelve houses from fully assembling,

root.m_Talk_ENG: we thank you for responding to the Council's call without hesitation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: we thank you for responding to the Council's call without hesitation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: we thank you for responding to the Council's call without hesitation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the name of Mahel Frayder, servant of the stars, may the Star Guide light your path.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the name of Mahel Frayder, servant of the stars, may the Star Guide light your path.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the name of Mahel Frayder, servant of the stars, may the Star Guide light your path.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Hansol. Doesn't this feel like one of the Academy Chairwoman's old speeches?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Hansol. Doesn't this feel like one of the Academy Chairwoman's old speeches?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Hansol. Doesn't this feel like one of the Academy Chairwoman's old speeches?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My eyes...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My eyes...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My eyes...

root.m_Talk_ENG: are closing...
root.m_Talk_DEU: are closing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: are closing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's disrespectful, Dame Liv. You should pay attention.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's disrespectful, Dame Liv. You should pay attention.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's disrespectful, Dame Liv. You should pay attention.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Sir Hansol! These chairs are suuuper soft!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Sir Hansol! These chairs are suuuper soft!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Sir Hansol! These chairs are suuuper soft!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boing! Boing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boing! Boing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boing! Boing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-Captain! Deputy! Help me, please!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-Captain! Deputy! Help me, please!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-Captain! Deputy! Help me, please!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You two? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You two? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You two? What's wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...No way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...No way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...No way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Elders... That thing they're holding. Could it be...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Elders... That thing they're holding. Could it be...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Elders... That thing they're holding. Could it be...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then. We've gathered you to deliver the Council's stance on recent disgraceful acts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then. We've gathered you to deliver the Council's stance on recent disgraceful acts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then. We've gathered you to deliver the Council's stance on recent disgraceful acts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You all know of Blue Shift's unauthorized participation in the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You all know of Blue Shift's unauthorized participation in the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You all know of Blue Shift's unauthorized participation in the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An order is justice in structure. If one breaks tradition for personal intent, we are bound to hold them accountable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An order is justice in structure. If one breaks tradition for personal intent, we are bound to hold them accountable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An order is justice in structure. If one breaks tradition for personal intent, we are bound to hold them accountable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the former captain swore the same oath, we didn't know if it came from conviction or pride...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the former captain swore the same oath, we didn't know if it came from conviction or pride...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the former captain swore the same oath, we didn't know if it came from conviction or pride...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now, their reckless defiance, straying from the orbit of the stars, has shattered the steadfast trust of our knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now, their reckless defiance, straying from the orbit of the stars, has shattered the steadfast trust of our knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now, their reckless defiance, straying from the orbit of the stars, has shattered the steadfast trust of our knights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To the one who strayed from the light of the constellations and broke her vow, we name you now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To the one who strayed from the light of the constellations and broke her vow, we name you now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To the one who strayed from the light of the constellations and broke her vow, we name you now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Esterosa de Chevalier.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Esterosa de Chevalier.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Esterosa de Chevalier.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: We will now begin deliberation on the <color=#ffd34c>dismissal of her position as Knight Captain</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We will now begin deliberation on the <color=#ffd34c>dismissal of her position as Knight Captain</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We will now begin deliberation on the <color=#ffd34c>dismissal of her position as Knight Captain</color>.
